objective: List 10 high-margin product categories for eBay reselling in 2026 US market. For each: category name, typical source price at thrift stores or wholesale, typical eBay sell price, estimated margin percentage, and a one-line explanation of why it sells well. Format as a numbered list.

result.explanation: Collectors seek rare and limited edition records, making this category a high-margin opportunity.
Luxury brands' popularity drives demand for authenticated designer handbags.
Fashion enthusiasts and collectors drive demand for unique, high-quality vintage clothing.
Book collectors and scholars seek rare and out-of-print titles.
Musicians and music enthusiasts seek high-quality instruments in good condition.
Jewelry enthusiasts and collectors seek high-quality, authentic pieces.
Home decor enthusiasts and collectors seek unique, high-quality furniture pieces.
Sports fans and collectors seek authentic, high-quality memorabilia.
Beauty enthusiasts and collectors seek high-quality, authentic cosmetics.
Collectors and enthusiasts seek rare and high-quality toys and action figures.
